final_answer:
From the search results, we can see that Paul Lynch is the author of the 2023 Booker Prize-winning novel "Prophet Song." 

Paul Lynch has won several awards, including:
- The 2018 Kerry Group Irish Fiction Award
- The 2020 Ireland Francophonie Ambassadors' Literary Award
- The 2023 Booker Prize for "Prophet Song"

His first major award was the 2018 Kerry Group Irish Fiction Award. 

So, the author of the 2023 Booker Prize-winning novel is Paul Lynch. His first major award was the 2018 Kerry Group Irish Fiction Award.

Title: Official homepage of Irish author Paul Lynch

Snippet: Paul Lynch is the award-winning author of the novels — BEYOND THE SEA, GRACE, THE BLACK SNOW and RED SKY IN MORNING.

URL: https://dublinliteraryaward.ie/the-library/authors/paul-lynch/
Snippet: Paul Lynch is the award-winning author of five novels — Prophet Song, Beyond the Sea, Grace, The Black Snow and Red Sky in Morning. His most recent novel, Prophet Song, won the 2023 Booker Prize and was shortlisted for the Strega European Award and the An Post Irish Novel of the Year.
---
Title: Paul Lynch (writer) - Wikipedia
URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Paul_Lynch_(writer)
Snippet: Paul Lynch (born 1977) is an Irish novelist known for his poetic, lyrical style and exploration of complex themes. He has published five novels and has won several awards, including the 2018 Kerry Group Irish Fiction Award and the 2023 Booker Prize, for Prophet Song.

Snippet: Before Prophet Song, which is the winner of the Booker Prize 2023, Paul Lynch wrote four novels: Beyond the Sea, Grace, The Black Snow and Red Sky in Morning. His third novel, Grace, won the 2018 Kerry Group Irish Novel of the Year and the 2020 Ireland Francophonie Ambassadors' Literary Award.
